# SAError.Code.notAllowed

**Case**

The system restricts the feature on this iPhone at the current time.

## Declaration

```swift
case notAllowed
```

## Determining the error type

- **SAError.Code.invalidArgument**: The passed argument is invalid.
- **SAError.Code.notAuthorized**: The app isn’t authorized to perform the requested operation.
- **SAError.Code.operationFailed**: The requested operation failed; retrying may succeed.
